Interpretation||--||||||F|||20160503074913-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Reason for Amended Report: \.br\Correction of the pathologic interpretation, see below\.br\\.br\AMENDED PATHOLOGIC INTERPRETATION:\.br\NEGATIVE FOR INTRAEPITHELIAL LESION OR MALIGNANCY\.br\\.br\Recommendation:\.br\Recommend return to regular screening intervals unless otherwise clinically indicated.\.br\\.br\Otherwise the original LifeLabs' report remains unchanged.\.br\\.br\Follow-up Actions: \.br\Copies of this LifeLabs' Amended Report are sent to all Diagnosis||--||||||F|||20160427145414-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||\.br\Liquid Base Pap, Cervical/Endocervical:\.br\\.br\ATYPICAL SQUAMOUS CELLS: HIGH GRADE SQUAMOUS INTRAEPITHELIAL LESION CANNOT BE EXCLUDED\.br\\.br\Specimen Adequacy\.br\Satisfactory for evaluation: Atrophy, cannot assess transformation zone components. \.br\\.br\NOTE: The absence of transformation zone components is not a reason to repeat a Pap test earlier than the otherwise recommended interval. \.br\Reference: Ontario Cervical Screening Guidelines - A hard-copy report is also being sent via\.br\fax or mail - in order that EMR report may be\.br\checked for accuracy against the print versions.\.br\Any inconsistencies during this EMR validation\.br\period should be brought to the attention of\.br\LifeLabs Customer Care at 1(800)441-0987.
